svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/145.0.0.0" version="29.6.1" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="IJ2Dlj0FrPaYpzoR49Uk" name="Page-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="2240" dy="783" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1654" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=3;align=center;startSize=40;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="<<abstract>><br/>MediaItem" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="240" x="290" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" parent="2" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="- _nextId: int {static}
+ Id: int
+ Title: string
+ IsAvailable: bool
# AvailabilityLabel: string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="2" style="line;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="8" width="240" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="2" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="# MediaItem(string title)
+ GetDetails(): string {abstract}
~ MarkBorrowed(): void
~ MarkReturned(): void
+ ToString(): string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Book" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="240" x="50" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="6" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="+ Author: string
+ Genre: string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="240" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="6" style="line;strokeColor=#82b366;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="8" width="240" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="6" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="+ Book(title, author, genre)
+ GetDetails(): string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="240" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="DVD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="240" x="530" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="10" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="+ Director: string
+ RuntimeMinutes: int" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="240" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="10" style="line;strokeColor=#82b366;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="8" width="240" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="10" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="+ DVD(title, director, runtimeMinutes)
+ GetDetails(): string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="240" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Borrower" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="290" x="880" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="14" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="- _nextId: int {static}
+ Id: int
+ Name: string
+ Address: string
+ ContactNumber: string
+ Email: string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="250" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="14" style="line;strokeColor=#d6b656;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="8" width="290" y="126" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="14" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="+ Borrower(name, address, contactNumber, email)
+ UpdateContactNumber(string): void
+ UpdateEmail(string): void
+ ToString(): string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="290" y="134" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="Transaction" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="270" x="290" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" parent="18" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="- _nextId: int {static}
+ Id: int

+ BorrowedOn: DateTime
+ ReturnedOn: DateTime?
+ IsReturned: bool" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="112" width="270" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="18" style="line;strokeColor=#b85450;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="8" width="270" y="142" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="18" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="+ Transaction(Borrower, MediaItem)
+ CompleteReturn(): void
+ ToString(): string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="270" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" parent="1" style="swimlane;fontStyle=1;align=center;startSize=30;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="Library" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="300" x="880" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="23" parent="22" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="- _inventory: List<MediaItem>
- _borrowers: List<Borrower>
- _transactions: List<Transaction>
+ Name: string" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="24" parent="22" style="line;strokeColor=#9673a6;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="8" width="300" y="94" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="25" parent="22" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;overflow=hidden;fontSize=12;" value="+ Library(string name)
+ AddMedia(MediaItem): void
+ RemoveMedia(int): bool
+ FindMedia(int): MediaItem
+ AddBorrower(Borrower): void
+ RemoveBorrower(int): bool
+ FindBorrower(int): Borrower
+ CheckOut(int, int): Transaction
+ ReturnMedia(int): Transaction
+ DisplayAllMedia(): void
+ DisplayAllBorrowers(): void
+ DisplayAllTransactions(): void
+ DisplayCheckedOutItems(): void" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="208" width="300" y="102" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="26" edge="1" parent="1" source="6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="27" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=block;endFill=0;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="28" edge="1" parent="1" source="22" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;startArrow=diamond;startFill=1;endArrow=none;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" target="2" value="manages inventory"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="220" y="450" /> <mxPoint x="220" y="135" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="29" edge="1" parent="1" source="22" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;startArrow=diamond;startFill=1;endArrow=none;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" target="14" value="manages borrowers"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" edge="1" parent="1" source="22" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;startArrow=diamond;startFill=1;endArrow=none;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" target="18" value="records transactions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" edge="1" parent="1" source="18" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" target="14" value="borrowed by"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" edge="1" parent="1" source="18" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" target="2" value="for item"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
